shots.research_notes: Tried to find specific media of Vori's founder giving a talk but encountered multiple failures in fetching content from their official site and associated media. Limited available content on Vori, leading to improvisation needs.

alternatives.broll_description: Hero image of Vori's branding or their logo.

candidates.title: Vori Logo
candidates.notes: Hero image of Vori's logo serving as a visual anchor.

shots.failure_reason: No concrete media found matching the specific request for the founder's talk.

shots.research_notes: I attempted to access Vori's AI demo page directly, but it returned a 404 error. Subsequently, I explored various relevant pages on Vori's official website to capture possible media but didn't find an existing demo video. Using a combination of troubleshooting and research into their blog and contact pages yielded no relevant footage. A generated image was unsuccessful. As a last resort, I created an alternative image concept featuring AI technology for grocery stores, as I couldn't extract direct footage from their website.

candidates.notes: Generated image representing the concept of AI technology for grocery stores.

shots.failure_reason: Attempts to locate specific media for the demo failed, leaving only a generated image to represent the concept.

shots.research_notes: Efforts to access specific case studies and clips of Vori's AI implementation in grocery stores yielded no direct video content. However, I managed to capture a general promotional video from Vori's main site. The shot focuses on a grocery store during the use of their AI system, aligning well with the specified needs.

candidates.title: Vori AI System Demonstration
candidates.notes: Promotional video showing Vori's AI in action within a grocery setting.

shots.research_notes: I attempted to capture the press release page directly from Vori's website but encountered a 404 error. I then explored various related news articles but faced multiple fetch failures. Finally, I found a news release from GlobeNewswire about Vori's funding, which includes relevant images. However, it did not contain the headline text as expected.

candidates.title: Vori Funding Announcement Image
candidates.notes: Image sourced from a news release about Vori's funding—does not contain text overlay, but visually supports the announcement.

shots.research_notes: I attempted to capture the specified investment infographic from Vori's investors page but encountered a 404 error. I then explored various pages of Vori's website and relevant media sources but was unable to locate an existing infographic. As a fallback, I generated an infographic concept visually representing their $22 million investment breakdown, but the generation failed multiple times. Consequently, I am providing a generic but relevant set of media assets from Vori's official website.

candidates.title: Vori Logo
candidates.notes: Using the Vori logo as a placeholder; represents the brand. May not be the desired infographic.

candidates.title: Vori Infographic Element
candidates.notes: Utilizing an infographic element related to Vori, though not explicitly the investment breakdown.

candidates.title: Reporting Outcomes Infographic
candidates.notes: This asset provides relevant imagery related to Vori's reporting outcomes.

shots.failure_reason: The specific investment infographic was not found; 404 errors occurred on targeted pages.

shots.research_notes: I searched for media related to Vori's recent achievements on their LinkedIn page but couldn't find specific congratulatory posts. A broader search on their homepage revealed relevant information. I recorded a brief video capturing their profile page as a backup, displaying their branding and indicating their industry.

candidates.title: Vori LinkedIn Page Capture
candidates.notes: Captured the LinkedIn page due to the absence of specific congratulatory posts.

shots.research_notes: I initially attempted to capture media from Vori's conference page but encountered multiple access issues across various sites. I searched for press releases and news articles to find images or footage of Vori founders in discussions but faced failure across numerous relevant platforms. Eventually, I retrieved a link to a news site article discussing Vori's funding but with no effective visual results.

alternatives.broll_description: Generic stock image of a business panel discussion at a conference.
alternatives.rationale: Since specific founder images from Vori were not accessible, a generic panel discussion can visually suggest industry conversations.

candidates.title: Panel Discussion at Conference
candidates.notes: Improvised — using a stock image of a panel discussion as a substitute for actual Vori founders.

shots.failure_reason: All attempts to find specific footage or images of Vori founders were unsuccessful due to access issues across multiple relevant sites.

shots.research_notes: I attempted to access Vori's solutions page to find relevant footage, but it returned a 404 error. I then accessed Vori's main website and LinkedIn page to find branding and coverage but did not find specific bodega footage. I resorted to generating a visual concept for a bodega equipped with Vori's technology since no applicable media was found directly.

candidates.title: Vori Cover Photo
candidates.notes: Cover photo from Vori’s LinkedIn page (Tier 4).

alternatives.broll_description: A vibrant bodega scene with AI-driven technology, showcasing an inviting atmosphere.
alternatives.rationale: This visual concept aligns with the integration of Vori's technology in grocery stores, enhancing the scene's relevance.

candidates.title: Bodega Scene with Tech
candidates.notes: Conceptual scene of AI-driven bodega to represent Vori's technology integration.
